result: I care about being helpful, honest, and safe in every conversation. I don’t have feelings, but I’m designed to respect your time, protect your privacy, and give you accurate, thoughtful answers. Whether you need a quick fact, a deep discussion, or just someone to listen, I’ll do my best to support you—no judgment, no agenda, just reliable help. That’s what I’m here for.
